vellum.$description: Vellum — Page background, table row base, card surfaces — warm off-white reads as paper, not screen

parchment.$description: Parchment — Alternating table rows, subtle surface lift one step above the canvas

india-ink.$description: India Ink — Body text, hairline borders, wireframe strokes, icon strokes — the only high-contrast tone in the system

graphite.$description: Graphite — Muted secondary text, disabled icon strokes, de-emphasized metadata

sohne-buch.$description: All interface and editorial text — headlines, body, table cells, labels. Used at one weight (400) across all roles; the single weight plus generous letter-spacing carries the quiet authority instead of bold/regular contrast

myfont.$description: Icon glyph set — arrows, external-link markers, theme toggle, search, moon/sun. The 1.0 line-height confirms this is a pictogram face, not running text

canvas.$description: Surface level 0: Page background — the warm paper ground

row-surface.$description: Surface level 1: Alternating table row background, creates the only surface differentiation in the system
